title: RC210, Advanced Canada workers benefit advance payments (ACWB) statement - Canada.ca
content:
## RC210, Advanced Canada workers benefit (ACWB) statement
This is the portion of the Advanced Canada workers benefit that was issued as payments for the tax year indicated on this statement. Enter this amount on your Schedule 6 of your return.
Report these amounts on your tax return. Keep a copy of this slip for your records and attach the other copy to your return.

### Report these amounts on your Schedule 6.
Keep a copy of this slip for your records and attach the other copy to your return.

### Box 10, Total Basic Advanced Canada workers benefit
This is the total Advanced Canada workers benefit that was issued for the basic portion of your benefit shown on this statement. This amount must be reported on line 38120 of your Schedule 6 or line 38121 of your spouse's or common-law partner's Schedule 6 (if applicable).

### Box 11, Total Advanced Canada workers benefit disability supplement
This is the total Advanced Canada workers benefit that was issued for the disability supplement portion of your benefit shown on this statement. Enter this amount on line 38122 of your Schedule 6.
For more information about the Advanced Canada workers benefit, visit canada.ca/canada-workers-benefit .
If you have any questions about this statement, call the CRA at 1-800-959-8281 .

## Related services and information
